title: UAW: Stellantis Can’t Blame Workers Or EVs For Losses
description:
If you work the line at a Big Three automaker, late February is usually a time to celebrate. The annual profit-sharing checks get announced, and for the last few years, they’ve been absolute blockbusters. This year? The mood in Detroit depends entirely on whose badge is on your polo shirt. ... [continued]

The post UAW: Stellantis Can’t Blame Workers Or EVs For Losses appeared first on CleanTechnica.
